leads.size_hint: Single aesthetic clinic, part of Rejuvie group (sister dental clinics in Kuta & Sanur)
leads.why_pain: Public review describes contacting the clinic via WhatsApp to book, getting a few replies then 'nothing, radio silence' - reviewer explicitly says 'Clearly don't want my money so I've gone somewhere else.' Direct, documented lost revenue from unanswered WhatsApp.
leads.evidence: https://www.trustindex.io/reviews/rejuvieclinic.com (review citing WhatsApp radio silence and taking business elsewhere)
leads.contact_channel: Website contact form / clinic WhatsApp listed on rejuvieclinic.com
leads.outreach_angle: AI WhatsApp inquiry-responder that answers every booking message in seconds, 24/7, and hands warm leads to staff - directly fixes the exact complaint visible in their public reviews.
leads.personalization: Reference (tactfully) that a public Trustindex review mentions a booking inquiry that went unanswered on WhatsApp and the customer went to a competitor; quantify what one lost aesthetic package per week costs.
